sentence: La wawa duerme mientras su mamá teje una chompa.
ipa: la wawa dweɾme mjentɾas su mama texe una tʃompa
gloss_en: The baby sleeps while her mother knits a sweater.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; final [u]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: En el altiplano hace mucho frío por las noches.
ipa: en el altiplano ase mutʃo fɾio poɾ las notʃes
gloss_en: On the altiplano it is very cold at night.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Mi abuela cocina chuño con queso y ají.
ipa: mi aβwela kosina tʃuɲo kon keso i axi
gloss_en: My grandmother cooks chuño with cheese and chilli.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Los cholos venden naranjas en la esquina.
ipa: los tʃolos benden naɾanxas en la eskina
gloss_en: The cholos sell oranges on the corner.
notes: cross-word sandhi elision; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: El niño lleva su mochila llena de cuadernos.
ipa: el niɲo ʝeba su motʃila ʝena de kwaðeɾnos
gloss_en: The boy carries his backpack full of notebooks.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; word-initial ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Vamos a la fiesta de la Virgen en el pueblo.
ipa: bamos a la fjesta de la biɾxen en el pweblo
gloss_en: We are going to the Virgin's feast in the town.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Ese caballo corre rápido por el cerro.
ipa: ese kaβaʝo kore rapiðo poɾ el sero
gloss_en: That horse runs fast across the hill.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Compré cinco panes y una botella de api.
ipa: kompɾe sinko panes i una boteʝa de api
gloss_en: I bought five loaves and a bottle of api.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: La lluvia moja las calles de la ciudad.
ipa: la ʝubja moxa las kaʝes de la sjuðað
gloss_en: The rain soaks the city streets.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Nosotros comemos silpancho con arroz y papas.
ipa: nosotɾos komemos silpantʃo kon aros i papas
gloss_en: We eat silpancho with rice and potatoes.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: ¿Vos sabes dónde queda la plaza principal?
ipa: bos saβes donde keða la plasa pɾinsipal
gloss_en: Do you know where the main square is?
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: El río baja turbio después de la tormenta.
ipa: el rio baxa tuɾbjo despues de la toɾmenta
gloss_en: The river runs muddy after the storm.
notes: trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Mi hermano estudia ingeniería en la universidad.
ipa: mi eɾmano estuðja inxenjeɾia en la unibeɾsiðað
gloss_en: My brother studies engineering at the university.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: La señora teje una manta de lana de llama.
ipa: la seɲoɾa texe una manta de lana de ʝama
gloss_en: The lady weaves a blanket of llama wool.
notes: yeísmo ⟨ll/y⟩ to [ʝ]; word-initial ⟨ll⟩ [ʝ]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Prende la radio, quiero escuchar la cueca.
ipa: pɾende la raðjo kjeɾo eskutʃaɾ la kweka
gloss_en: Turn on the radio, I want to listen to the cueca.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Aquel cerro tiene nieve durante el invierno.

gloss_en: That hill has snow during the winter.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Los turistas suben al mirador cada mañana.
ipa: los tuɾistas suβen al miɾaðoɾ kaða maɲana
gloss_en: The tourists climb to the lookout every morning.
notes: palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Hierve el agua antes de tomar el mate.
ipa: jeɾbe el aɡa antes de tomaɾ el mate
gloss_en: Boil the water before drinking the mate.
notes: tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: El zorro se escondió detrás de la peña.
ipa: el soro se eskondio detɾas de la peɲa
gloss_en: The fox hid behind the crag.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; trill [r]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.

sentence: Trae leña seca para encender el fuego.
ipa: tɾae leɲa seka paɾa ensendeɾ el fweɣo
gloss_en: Bring dry firewood to light the fire.
notes: seseo merges ⟨c/z⟩ to [s]; palatal nasal ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ]; tonic Ĕ>ie / Ō>ue diphthong [je we]; coda /s/ retained as [s] per hualde2005 / lipski1994.
